paper_quote: GPT Pro consult §3: arctanViaArcsinℂ requires this Mathlib lemma
informal_pl: Standardowa nierówność |x| < √(1+x²) pociąga, że x/√(1+x²) jest w (-1, 1).
lean_target_signature: theorem atanArg_in_Ioo (x : ℝ) : x / Real.sqrt (1 + x^2) ∈ Set.Ioo (-1 : ℝ) 1
notes: SEALED 2026-05-08 by Aristotle. ~3-line proof using `lt_div_iff₀`/`div_lt_iff₀` plus `nlinarith` with `Real.sq_sqrt`. Proof time: ~6 minutes. Ready to inline into Framework/Complex/Periodicity.lean for the arctanViaArcsin construction.
